ddls:
CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the month */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watering_days" (
  "watering_days_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watering days record */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the month */,
  "watering_days_count" INTEGER /* Number of watering days allowed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watering_days_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watering_days_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residents" (
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resident */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the resident */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the resident */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the resident */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the resident */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_usage" (
  "water_usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water usage record */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resident */,
  "water_usage_date" TEXT /* Date of water usage */,
  "water_usage_amount" REAL /* Amount of water used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("water_usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the month */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resident */,
  "water_usage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the water usage data */,
  "complaint_type" TEXT /* Type of complaint */,
  "complaint_description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint */,
  "complaint_count" INTEGER /* Number of complaints received */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_water_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("water_usage_id") REFERENCES water_usage ("water_usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the complaint category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_category_map" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the complaint */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the complaint category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_up_actions_types" (
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up action type */,
  "action_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the follow-up action type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_up_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up action */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the complaint */,
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the follow-up action type */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the follow-up action */,
  "action_count" INTEGER /* Number of follow-up actions taken */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_up_actions_action_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_type_id") REFERENCES follow_up_actions_types ("action_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_up_actions_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warning_types" (
  "warning_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warning type */,
  "warning_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the warning type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warnings" (
  "warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warning */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the complaint */,
  "warning_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warning type */,
  "warning_description" TEXT /* Description of the warning */,
  "warning_count" INTEGER /* Number of warnings issued */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warnings_warning_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("warning_type_id") REFERENCES warning_types ("warning_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warnings_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalty_types" (
  "penalty_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty type */,
  "penalty_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the penalty type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the complaint */,
  "penalty_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the penalty type */,
  "penalty_description" TEXT /* Description of the penalty */,
  "penalty_amount" REAL /* Amount of the penalty */,
  "penalty_count" INTEGER /* Number of penalties assessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_penalty_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("penalty_type_id") REFERENCES penalty_types ("penalty_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the penalty */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_penalty_id FOREIGN KEY ("penalty_id") REFERENCES penalties ("penalty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
